solution: Benefits Integrity Cloud — FWA Detection & Prevention

agents.name: Identity Proofing Agent
agents.role: Request and verify a verifiable digital credential before intake proceeds.

agents.name: Document Parsing Agent
agents.role: Extract structured fields from uploaded identity and supporting documents.

agents.name: Validation Agent
agents.role: Detect tampering, forgery and expiry; match document fields to applicant data.

agents.name: Face Verification Agent
agents.role: Run liveness and deepfake detection on the remote consultation; match to ID portrait.

agents.name: Consistency Checker
agents.role: Cross-match employer, income, residency against tax/employment/registry data.

agents.name: Eligibility Decision Agent
agents.role: Aggregate all agent findings into an explainable accept / review / block decision.

agents.name: Cyber Signals Agent
agents.role: Detect coordinated/automated submission bursts from telemetry (IP, device, cadence).

agents.name: Prioritization Agent
agents.role: Rank clusters and applications by fraud likelihood for officer review.

agents.name: Graph Relationship Explorer
agents.role: Build and traverse the relationship network linking applicants to shared entities.

agents.name: Document Generator
agents.role: Compile the evidence into a structured case file (Word) for investigators.

agents.name: Notification Agent
agents.role: Dispatch governed, field-minimized alerts to partner agencies.
